# DigitalDukandar — Free Online Store Builder India

> DigitalDukandar is a free ecommerce website builder for Indian entrepreneurs, small businesses, and resellers. It lets anyone create a professional online store in minutes — no coding, no technical skills required. Every store gets its own subdomain, product catalog, cart, checkout, and full admin dashboard. Perfect for selling clothes, electronics, groceries, handmade goods, or any product online.

## What is DigitalDukandar

DigitalDukandar is an Indian ecommerce website builder and multi-tenant online store platform. Store owners sign up, set up their store, add products, and immediately start selling online. Each store runs on its own subdomain (e.g. mybrand.digitaldukandar.in) or a custom domain. The platform handles hosting, payments, shipping, SEO, and design — so sellers focus only on their products and customers.

## Platform Pages

- [Home](https://digitaldukandar.in/): Main landing page — start building your free online store
- [Pricing](https://digitaldukandar.in/pricing): Free and paid subscription plans with feature breakdown
- [Sign Up / Login](https://digitaldukandar.in/auth): Create a new store or log in to your existing store account
- [Privacy Policy](https://digitaldukandar.in/privacy-policy): Data handling and privacy information
- [Terms of Service](https://digitaldukandar.in/terms-of-service): Platform usage terms and conditions

## Core Ecommerce Features

- **Free store builder**: Create a fully functional online store for free with no coding
- **Instant subdomain**: Every store gets a live URL (storename.digitaldukandar.in) immediately
- **Custom domain support**: Connect your own domain (e.g. mybrand.com) to your store
- **Product management**: Add unlimited products with images, descriptions, prices, and variants
- **Category management**: Organize products into categories for easy browsing
- **Shopping cart**: Built-in cart and checkout flow for customers
- **Order management**: View, track, and manage customer orders from the dashboard
- **Payments**: Integrated payment gateway support for Indian sellers (Razorpay)
- **Shipping integration**: Powered by Shiprocket for pan-India delivery and tracking
- **Discounts & Coupons**: Create promotional codes and discount campaigns
- **WhatsApp support**: Floating WhatsApp button for customer support on every store

## Store Design & Customization

- **AI Designer**: AI-powered store redesign — describe your vision in plain language and the AI applies colors, fonts, layouts, and styles
- **Theme customization**: CSS variable-based design system (primary color, background, radius, typography)
- **Mobile responsive**: All stores are fully responsive and mobile-friendly by default
- **Dark mode**: Built-in light/dark mode support

## Growth & Marketing Tools

- **SEO settings**: Per-store meta titles, descriptions, and structured data
- **Sitemap generation**: Automatic XML sitemaps for search engine indexing
- **Social media settings**: Instagram and social media integration per store
- **Analytics**: Sales reports, order analytics, and growth tracking
- **Google Reviews**: Customer review management

## For Store Owners (Admin)

- [Admin Dashboard](https://digitaldukandar.in/admin/dashboard): Central hub to manage your entire store
- [Products](https://digitaldukandar.in/admin/products): Add and manage your product catalog
- [Orders](https://digitaldukandar.in/admin/orders): View and process customer orders
- [Categories](https://digitaldukandar.in/admin/categories): Organize products into categories
- [Analytics](https://digitaldukandar.in/admin/analytics): Sales and traffic insights
- [SEO Settings](https://digitaldukandar.in/admin/growth/seo): Optimize your store for search engines
- [Shipping](https://digitaldukandar.in/admin/shipping): Configure delivery options and Shiprocket
- [Store Settings](https://digitaldukandar.in/admin/settings): Branding, logo, store name, and preferences
- [AI Designer](https://digitaldukandar.in/admin/ai-designer): Redesign your storefront using AI prompts
- [Buy AI Tokens](https://digitaldukandar.in/admin/buy-tokens): Purchase credits for AI design generation

## Who Is It For

- Small business owners in India wanting to sell online
- Resellers and dropshippers needing a quick storefront
- Handmade and artisan sellers (jewellery, clothing, home decor)
- Grocery and local shops going digital
- Fashion brands and boutiques
- Electronics and gadget sellers
- Anyone who wants to build an online store without hiring a developer

## Technical Details

- Hosted on Indian servers for fast load times within India
- Built with React, TypeScript, and Supabase
- Supports both subdomain routing and custom domain routing
- Multi-tenant architecture: thousands of stores on one platform
- SEO-optimized storefront pages with meta tags and structured data
- Sitemap: [https://digitaldukandar.in/sitemap.xml](https://digitaldukandar.in/sitemap.xml)
